Appearances:
J. Michael Phelps (433-3733) for plaintiff and responding party
D. Mark Jackson of Bassi Martini Edlin & Blum (397-9006) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. The punitive damage claim is properly plead. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick Mahoney; Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR #5162

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearances:
J. Michael Phelps (433-3733) for plaintiff and responding party
D. Mark Jackson of Bassi Martini Edlin & Blum (397-9006) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: overruled, 10 days to answer. The Court of Appeals directed the trial Court to hear the demurrer. The statute of limitations is 3 years for the negligence property claim and 4 years for the breach of fiduciary duty claim. The Court has considered the allegations of the 1st and 2nd amended complaints and finds that plaintiff has plead sufficient facts of the time and manner of discovery, due diligence and a lack of the requisite notice prior to September 2003. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick Mahoney; Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR #5162
